title: Appendix B — References
text:
This appendix lists the full bibliography for the course. All items in includes/references.bib are included here via nocite: "@*".




Chang, Winston. 2018. R Graphics Cookbook: Practical Recipes for Visualizing Data. O’Reilly Media. https://r-graphics.org/.


Fisher, R. A. 1936. “The Use of Multiple Measurements in Taxonomic Problems.” Annals of Eugenics 7 (2): 179–88.


Henderson, H. V., and P. F. Velleman. 1981. “Building Multiple Regression Models Interactively.” Biometrics 37: 391–411.


Matloff, Norman. 2011. The Art of r Programming: A Tour of Statistical Software Design. No Starch Press. https://nostarch.com/artofr.htm.


R Core Team. 2023. R: A Language and Environment for Statistical Computing. R Foundation for Statistical Computing. https://www.R-project.org/.


———. n.d. CRAN (Comprehensive r Archive Network). https://cran.r-project.org/.


RStudio Team. 2023. RStudio: Integrated Development Environment for r. RStudio, PBC. http://www.rstudio.com/.


“Stack Overflow - r Tag.” n.d. https://stackoverflow.com/questions/tagged/r.


Teetor, Paul. 2011. R Cookbook: Proven Recipes for Data Analysis, Statistics, and Graphics. O’Reilly Media.


Wickham, Hadley. 2016. Ggplot2: Elegant Graphics for Data Analysis. Springer-Verlag New York. https://ggplot2-book.org/.


———. 2017. Readr: Read Rectangular Text Data. https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=readr.


Wickham, Hadley, and Garrett Grolemund. 2017. R for Data Science: Import, Tidy, Transform, Visualize, and Model Data. O’Reilly Media, Inc. https://r4ds.had.co.nz/.
